commands: echo '=== Stop + clean + relaunch shard A ==='
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'pkill -f run-pilot3 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f launch-smoker 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 2'
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd ~/platform && git pull 2>&1 | tail -3 && bash scripts/launchers/launch-smoker-shard-a.sh 2>&1 | tail -6'
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'ps -ef | grep -v grep | grep run-pilot3 | head -2'
